data.title: Lilly's Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) significantly extended progression-free survival when added to a venetoclax time-limited regimen in patients with previously treated CLL/SLL
data.description: The BRUIN CLL-322 study represents the initial Phase 3 analysis in Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia utilizing a venetoclax-containing control arm, showcasing superior performance. The trial mainly included patients who had received prior treatment with covalent BTK inhibitors, which is significant in the current medical landscape. These findings signify the fourth milestone in the field.

data.title: Novo Nordisk A/S - share repurchase programme
data.description: In Bagsværd, Denmark, on April 13, 2026, Novo Nordisk started a share buyback initiative on February 4, 2026, following the guidelines of Regulation No 596/2014 of the European Parliament and Council and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. This action is part of a larger share repurchase plan totaling DKK 15 billion, set to be completed within a one-year timeframe starting from February 4, 2026.
SOMNIGROUP TO BUY LEGGETT & PLATT IN STOCK DEAL VALUED AT $2.5B

data.title: Somnigroup International, the World's Leading Bedding Company, to Acquire Leggett & Platt, A Diversified Component Manufacturer and Key Somnigroup Supplier, in an All-Stock Transaction
data.description: Implementing their vertical integration strategy, the company is focusing on consumer-centric innovation, broadening their reach in the bedding and non-bedding industries. They aim to lower financial leverage, boost operating cash flow, and achieve an immediate increase in adjusted EPS before synergies. This move is expected to enhance their market position and drive growth.

data.title: Bitcoin Falls To $70,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Drop 1% On Geopolitical Uncertainty
data.description: Bitcoin's value plummeted from $73,000 to $70,000 following heightened geopolitical tensions, resulting in $184.36 million worth of liquidations in the past 24 hours. In positive news, Bitcoin ETFs experienced a net inflow of $256.8 million, while Ethereum ETFs garnered $64.95 million in net inflows. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $70,750.36, Ethereum at $2,184.16, Solana at $81.84, XRP at $1.32, Dogecoin at $0.09092, and Shiba Inu at $0.05765. Meme coin market capitalization has decreased by 1.4%. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
